enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs a morning before heading to work after four days off due to bad weather. He briefly describes his bike commute setup and recaps the previous day's activities, which included gluing protective parts onto his bike, mounting a GoPro on his helmet, and organizing music for swimming.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoys it despite recurring flat tire issues
ready to get back to work after four days off

transcript.text: I'm like four days off and so now it's time to work again and actually I think I had five days off
From the bad weather and it's 6.45 now I'm going to leave in 15 minutes
I've got to be there at 8 but it's like 10 miles away
I don't know, leave plenty of time, especially if in case I get a flat
Because I'm always getting flats, I've had like four flats between this year and last year
This is my rig by the way, I just dropped my shoes to the back of that
Got some power bars and my bike lock in there, hat and stuff
Got to make sure to drink a lot, get dehydrated every time
Because today's a big day, but yeah, what did I do yesterday?
I just glued some stuff on my motorbike, this protector plate
